topics.description: Large BPF workloads used to measure verifier time and complexity; includes TC jhash, pyperf, and strobemeta families.

tests.name: selftest_verif_scale1
tests.description: Verifier scale test: smaller TC ingress jhash loop (baseline scale relative to verif_scale2/3).

tests.name: selftest_verif_scale2
tests.description: Verifier scale test: TC ingress program with a large jhash loop over packet headers (moderate instruction count).

tests.name: selftest_verif_scale3
tests.description: Verifier scale test: another TC jhash loop variant sized between verif_scale1 and verif_scale2.

tests.name: selftest_verif_scale_pyperf50
tests.description: Verifier scale test: pyperf-style program with LLVM fully unrolling ~50 loop iterations.

tests.name: selftest_verif_scale_pyperf100
tests.description: Verifier scale test: simulates Python stack-walking perf profiling with LLVM fully unrolling ~100 loop iterations.

tests.name: selftest_verif_scale_pyperf180
tests.description: Verifier scale test: pyperf-style Python stack walker with LLVM fully unrolling ~180 loop iterations.

tests.name: selftest_verif_scale_pyperf600_bpf_loop
tests.description: Verifier scale test: pyperf workload sized for ~600 logical loops, implemented with bpf_loop instead of full unroll.

tests.name: selftest_verif_scale_pyperf_subprogs
tests.description: Verifier scale test: pyperf stack walker split into multiple BPF subprograms.

tests.name: selftest_verif_scale_pyperf_global
tests.description: Verifier scale test: pyperf stack walker using global (non-inlined) subprogram functions.

tests.name: selftest_verif_scale_strobemeta
tests.description: Verifier scale test: large strobemeta workload with partial LLVM unroll (~20k insns, high state count).

tests.name: selftest_verif_scale_strobemeta_bpf_loop
tests.description: Verifier scale test: large strobemeta workload implemented with the bpf_loop helper instead of fully unrolled loops.

tests.name: selftest_verif_scale_strobemeta_subprogs
tests.description: Verifier scale test: large strobemeta program using non-inlined subprograms (not fully inlined).

tests.name: selftest_verif_scale_strobemeta_nounroll1
tests.description: Verifier scale test: strobemeta with tiny loops and no LLVM unrolling (variant 1).

tests.name: selftest_verif_scale_strobemeta_nounroll2
tests.description: Verifier scale test: strobemeta with tiny loops and no LLVM unrolling (variant 2).

topics.description: Targeted verifier behavior tests (control flow, register liveness) rather than large-scale benchmarks.

tests.name: selftest_verifier_gotol
tests.description: Verifier stress test for the BPF gotol (goto label) instruction with small immediates and control-flow jumps.

tests.name: selftest_verifier_liveness_exp
tests.description: Stress-tests verifier register liveness analysis (compute_live_registers) with arena maps and expected log output.

topics.description: Cgroup BPF hooks on getsockopt/setsockopt: loaded programs and inline-bytecode validation.

tests.name: selftest_setget_sockopt
tests.description: Exercises cgroup BPF getsockopt/setsockopt hooks on TCP/UDP sockets (IPv4/IPv6), including TLS and related socket options.

tests.name: selftest_sockopt
tests.description: Validates cgroup BPF getsockopt/setsockopt programs built from inline bytecode (attach types, errors, optval bounds).

topics.description: Packet-path BPF: TC redirect, XDP, and TCP SYN-cookie handling.

tests.name: selftest_cls_redirect
tests.description: TC clsact tests for redirecting packets between interfaces, including dynptr and subprogram variants.

tests.name: selftest_xdp_noinline
tests.description: XDP load-balancing program using non-inlined functions and per-CPU stats maps (verifier/jit path for noinline).

tests.name: selftest_tcp_custom_syncookie
tests.description: BPF program that implements custom TCP SYN-cookie generation/validation on incoming connections.

topics.description: BPF-to-BPF linking: fexit, freplace, and multi-program attachment patterns.

tests.name: selftest_fexit_bpf2bpf
tests.description: Tests fexit/freplace BPF-to-BPF attachment: chaining programs, replacing functions, mod-ret, and multi-program interactions.

topics.description: Kernel BPF helper APIs: loops, snprintf, and BTF-aware printing.

tests.name: selftest_bpf_loop
tests.description: Tests the bpf_loop helper for iterating with callbacks, nested loops, and map updates.

tests.name: selftest_snprintf
tests.description: Validates the bpf_snprintf helper: integer, IP, symbol, pointer, string, padding, and edge-case formatting.

tests.name: selftest_snprintf_btf
tests.description: Exercises bpf_snprintf_btf on live kernel objects (triggered via a netif_receive_skb trace program).

topics.description: bpf_iter programs that walk kernel objects (tasks, sockets, maps, links, routes, etc.).

tests.name: selftest_bpf_iter
tests.description: Comprehensive BPF iterator tests over tasks, sockets, maps, links, ksyms, netlink, routes, and related kernel objects.

tests.name: selftest_usdt
tests.description: Attaches to and reads User Statically Defined Tracing (USDT) probes, including multi-spec and urandom auto-attach cases.

topics.description: Map access patterns and experimental BPF arena / memory allocator APIs.

tests.name: selftest_map_ptr
tests.description: Tests BPF map pointer helpers and ringbuf access from a cgroup-SKB program via a lightweight skeleton.

tests.name: selftest_test_bpf_ma
tests.description: Tests experimental BPF memory allocator (arena) APIs and related map/program behavior.

topics.description: Compile-once run-everywhere relocations against kernel BTF via lightweight skeletons.

tests.name: selftest_core_kern_lskel
tests.description: Loads a lightweight-skeleton BPF program that checks BPF CO-RE (compile-once, run-everywhere) type relocation against kernel BTF.

topics.description: BPF timer callbacks under concurrent perf/NMI load.

tests.name: selftest_timer_stress_nmi_update
tests.description: Stress-tests BPF timers under perf/NMI pressure, focusing on timer update while callbacks run.

topics.description: Semester-project harness programs used to exercise the patched verifier profiler.

tests.name: selftest_test_profiler
tests.description: Project profiler harness: loads profiler1/2/3 BPF programs and sanity-runs sched_process_exec tracepoints.
